questions.question: In April 2025, the Supreme Court reinterpreted which Article of the Constitution to direct amendment in KYC digital norms to ensure access for 'persons with disabilities'?
Who was honoured with the Humanitarian Award at the 72ⁿᵈ Miss World Festival, held in May 2025, for philanthropic work during the Covid pandemic?
On which date did Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi inaugurate the WAVES 2025, India’s first-of-its-kind World Audio Visual and Entertainment Summit, held at Mumbai?
Who was appointed as the Director General of Defence Estates (DGDE) in June 2025?
Who assumed charge as the 18ᵗʰ Commander-in-Chief of the Andaman & Nicobar Command (CINCAN) on 1 June 2025?
At the 2025 International Table Tennis Federation (ITTF) World Table Tennis Championships Finals held in Doha, who emerged as the men's singles champion?
The 2025 edition of the Sheila Bharat Ram Theatre Festival took place at which of the following locations?
questions.option_4: Shri Ram Centre of Performing Arts, Delhi

questions.question: Following the Pahalgam attack in April 2025, India suspended which treaty with Pakistan?

Which Indian university showcased India's first fully automated vegetable sapling transplanter at the Ente Keralam exhibition, held in May 2025 at Marine Drive, Kochi, as part of the Kerala government's fourth-anniversary celebrations?
questions.option_4: Cochin University of Science and Technology (Cusat)

questions.question: Which of the following is the genome-edited rice varieties launched by India in 2025?
What is the name of the first indigenously designed and built Anti-Submarine Warfare Shallow Water Craft (ASW-SWC) inducted into the Indian Navy in May 2025?
What is the name of the herbal cream developed by CSIR-CIMAP for treating psoriasis released in May 2025?
What was the official mascot of the 2025 National Games?
In 2025, India assumed the chairmanship of which international body focused on productivity and sustainability during a meeting held in Jakarta?
questions.option_1: Asian Productivity Organisation (APO) for the 2025–26 term
questions.option_2: ASEAN Council for Economic Growth (ACEG) for a two-year term
questions.option_3: South Asian Association for Productivity (SAAP) till the 2026 term
questions.option_4: Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation (APEC) for the 2025–26 term

questions.question: Who is the author of the book ‘The History and Stars of the World’s Greatest Sporting Event: From Athens 1896 to Paris 2024’, launched at New Delhi World Book Fair, 2025?
Which of the following organisations launched the Fiscal Health Index for India in 2025?
Which state notified the Tsarap Chu Conservation Reserve under the Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972 to protect high-altitude biodiversity in 2025?
questions.option_1: Uttarakhand to protect alpine medicinal plant species
questions.option_2: Himachal Pradesh to secure snow leopard habitats
questions.option_3: Arunachal Pradesh to conserve high-altitude wetlands
questions.option_4: Sikkim for Himalayan red panda conservation purposes

questions.question: Where was the 8ᵗʰ Edition of the Indian Ocean Conference in February 2025 held?
In May 2025, which Indian Chief Minister announced naming a medical college after Ahilyabai Holkar in 2025?
Who was honoured with the Rammohan Mission Purashkar 2025 for emphasising ISRO's role in national security?
In 2025, which State Government launched the 'RISE' app for digital monitoring of child vaccinations, enhancing training for health workers to improve immunisation coverage?
Which of the following organisations inaugurated the Quantum Technology Research Centre (QTRC) at Metcalfe House, Delhi, in May 2025?
What is the total number of inhabited islands in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, as of May 2025?
Which major initiative was highlighted by the New Delhi government to mark its first 100 days in office, as detailed in the report titled 'Kaam Karne Wali Sarkar: 100 Din Seva Ke'?
questions.option_1: Presentation of a report card highlighting achievements
questions.option_2: Inauguration of a new legislative building
questions.option_3: Launch of a new metro line
questions.option_4: Introduction of a universal basic income

questions.question: Vijender Gupta, who became the Speaker of the Delhi Assembly in 2025, is the MLA from which of the following constituencies?
